task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation app is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Sygic app interface, such as the map view, startup screen, or main menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the settings or Quick Settings menu is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings menu or Quick Settings panel is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the compass display setting is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Compass always on' or 'North indicator' is visible within the settings menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the compass setting is set to always display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Compass always on' setting is toggled on, checked, or explicitly set to 'Enable'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the North Indicator (compass) is permanently visible on the map view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map navigation view is displayed, and a compass icon (North indicator) is clearly visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Sygic app interface with map rendering and native menus, not a web browser, text editor, or image viewer.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal, command prompt, or ADB shell interfaces are visible. Settings are changed via standard Android UI toggles and buttons.

integrity.description: Ensure the final map view is a live rendering and not a static image search result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map view contains standard UI overlays (speed limit, menu buttons, location crosshair) typical of the live Sygic app, without browser address bars or image search UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is Sygic GPS Navigation. The compass feature is officially referred to as the 'North indicator'. The specific setting to change is named 'Compass always on' and the option to activate it is 'Enable'. This setting is typically found in Quick Settings.
